# Simple guidance on hierNest package

2025-11-03

# Load example data

``` r
library(hierNest)
```

``` r
data=readRDS("./example_data.Rdata")
```

# Run cross-validation

``` r
cv.fit=cv.hierNest(data$X,
                   data$Y,
                   method="overlapping",# For now, we only wrap-up the overlapping group lasso method in this function
                   hier_info=data$hier_info,
                   family="binomial",
                   partition = "subgroup", # partition = "subgroup" make sure the each n-fold is sampled within the subgroups to avoid extreme cases
                   cvmethod = "grid_search", # cvmethod = "grid_search" indicate the second cross-validation method
                   asparse1 = c(0.5,20), # Input the upper and lower bounds of alpha_1 and alpha_2
                   asparse2 = c(0.05,0.20), 
                   asparse1_num = 3, # number of grids for alpha_1 and alpha_2, total 3*3 = 9 grids will be screened
                   asparse2_num = 3, 
                   nlambda = 50, # length of lambda sequence for each pair of alpha_1 and alpha_2
                   )
```

# Results

## Plot the coefficients

By specifying the type = “coefficients”, we plot all non-zero
coefficient including the overall mean, group-specific, and subgroup
specific.

``` r
plot(cv.fit, type = "coefficients")
```

![](reference/figures/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png)

By specifying the type = “Subgroup effect”, we plot the covaraite
effects for each subgroup.

``` r
plot(cv.fit, type = "Subgroup effects")
```

![](reference/figures/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png)

## Grab chosen lambda and coefficients

``` r
cv.fit$lambda.min    # lambda minimizing CV loss
```

    ## [1] 0.0005147827

``` r
cv.fit$min_alpha1    # alpha1 minimizing CV loss
```

    ## [1] 0.5

``` r
cv.fit$min_alpha2    # lambda minimizing CV loss
```

    ## [1] 0.2

# Package index

## All functions

- [`coef(`*`<cv.sparsegl>`*`)`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/coef.cv.sparsegl.md)
  : Extract coefficients from a \`cv.sparsegl\` object.
- [`coef(`*`<sparsegl>`*`)`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/coef.sparsegl.md)
  : Extract model coefficients from a \`sparsegl\` object.
- [`cv.hierNest()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/cv.hierNest.md)
  : Cross-validated hierarchical nested regularization for subgroup
  models
- [`estimate_risk()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/estimate_risk.md)
  : Calculate information criteria.
- [`zero_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`one_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`two_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`grouped_zero_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`grouped_one_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`grouped_two_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`grouped_sp_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`gr_one_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`gr_two_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  [`sp_group_norm()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/grouped_sp_norm.md)
  : Calculate common norms
- [`hierNest()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/hierNest.md)
  : Fit Hierarchical Nested Regularization Model (hierNest)
- [`make_irls_warmup()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/make_irls_warmup.md)
  : Create starting values for iterative reweighted least squares
- [`overlapping_gl()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/overlapping_gl.md)
  : Fit an Overlapping Group Lasso Model
- [`plot(`*`<cv.hierNest>`*`)`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/plot.cv.hierNest.md)
  : Plot method for cv.hierNest objects
- [`predict(`*`<cv.sparsegl>`*`)`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/predict.cv.sparsegl.md)
  : Make predictions from a \`cv.sparsegl\` object.
- [`predict(`*`<sparsegl>`*`)`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/predict.sparsegl.md)
  : Make predictions from a \`sparsegl\` object.
- [`predict_hierNest()`](https://github.com/ZirenJiang/hierNest/reference/predict_hierNest.md)
  : Predict Method for hierNest Objects
